items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement to review platforms such as Google, Yelp, and Trustpilot. However, the provided evidence does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding the integration or functionality related to these review platforms. As a result, it is not possible to determine if the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap in the implementation.
